title: Whirlpool India is Hiring: Quality Control Engineer (Mid-Level)

jsonLd.title: Whirlpool India is Hiring: Quality Control Engineer (Mid-Level)
jsonLd.description:
We at Whirlpool India are looking for an experienced Quality Control Engineer based out of Ranchi. If you are a result-oriented professional with a passion for excellence, we want to hear from you.

About Whirlpool India:
Whirlpool India is a leading organization in the On-site sector, committed to excellence, innovation, and employee growth. We offer a dynamic work environment where talent is recognized and rewarded.

Key Responsibilities:
• Ensure environmental compliance and waste management
• Coordinate with design and engineering teams on product improvements
• Coordinate with logistics for dispatching finished goods
• Ensure product quality meets internal and customer specifications
• Oversee daily production operations to meet output targets
• Prepare production cost analysis and efficiency reports
• Conduct root cause analysis for quality rejections and defects

Required Skills & Qualifications:
• BPharm / MPharm / PharmD
• 6-10 years of relevant experience
• Proficiency in AutoCAD
• Proficiency in 5S
• Proficiency in Lean Manufacturing
• Proficiency in Project Management
• Proficiency in Six Sigma
• Proficiency in PPAP
• Proficiency in Supply Chain Management
• Proficiency in APQP

Work Mode: On-site - Work from our office

What We Offer:
• Provident Fund and Gratuity as per company policy
• Annual paid leaves and casual leaves
• Annual performance appraisal
• Learning & development budget
• Referral bonus program
• Company-sponsored certifications
• Salary Range: 12 LPA - 25 LPA per annum

Location: Ranchi, Jharkhand, India

If you are excited about this opportunity, apply now and take the next step in your career journey with Whirlpool India!
